name: The Clorox Company
description: The Clorox Company is a leading multinational manufacturer and marketer of consumer and professional products. The company's diverse portfolio includes some of the most trusted and recognized brand names, such as its namesake bleach and cleaning products, Pine-Sol, Liquid-Plumr, Poett, Glad bags and wraps, Kingsford charcoal, Hidden Valley dressings, Brita water-filtration systems, Burt's Bees natural personal care products, and RenewLife digestive health supplements. Headquartered in Oakland, California, Clorox is committed to driving growth through its IGNITE strategy while maintaining a strong focus on corporate responsibility and sustainability.
